commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a fallback from memory-search config resolution's legacy memory embedding registry to the generic embedding-provider registry, plus a regression test for a generic-only `local` provider.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +24. Total +32 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main's config resolver does not consult the generic embedding-provider registry even though llama.cpp registers `local` there and docs say memory search can consume that seam. I did not establish a live installed-plugin Gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor or maintainer real-behavior proof plus provider-routing acceptance, not an automatable code repair.
